claim: Independent cross-check confirms the YOLO demand router schema readiness correctly blocks PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing evidence, clarify recommendations, block recommendations, or failed statuses. All explorer claims are verified by independent source file reads.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing.length > 0
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms lines 496-502 create blocker for unresolved missing evidence items

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED for clarify/block recommendations and failed statuses
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms lines 503-509 handle clarify recommendations (EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED) and blocked/block/failed/error verdicts and statuses (EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED)

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each agent result and spreads issues into blockerList
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms line 727 calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues and adds all returned issues to blockers

evidence.summary: prd_ready set to blockers.length === 0, ensuring any blocker prevents PRD readiness
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms final gate at line 756 prevents prd_ready when blockers exist

evidence.summary: Test case with missing array and clarify recommendation in cross-checker result
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms test provides cross-checker with missing: ['Need product owner confirmation...'] and recommendation: 'clarify'

evidence.summary: Test assertions verify prd_ready false and presence of EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms test asserts prd_ready === false and checks for both expected blocker codes

evidence.summary: Evidence dispatch calls inspectDemandPrdReadiness with agent_results and passes through session and triage context
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms integration between evidence-dispatch and router readiness inspection

risks: If independent verification had found discrepancies between claimed behavior and actual implementation, PRDs could be incorrectly blocked or allowed

result.notes: Cross-check independently verified all explorer claims by reading source files. The evidenceResultBlockingIssues function correctly creates blockers for missing evidence (EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING), clarify recommendations (EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED), and block/failed statuses (EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED). The inspectDemandPrdReadiness function calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each agent result and adds all issues to the blocker list. The prd_ready flag is set to blockers.length === 0, ensuring any evidence agent blocker prevents PRD generation. The existing test at lines 313-353 verifies this blocking behavior with missing evidence and clarify recommendation scenarios.
